# Third-party notices for the game integration

## Xenia-derived mouse input

The mouse-input implementation in `src/ge_hooks.cpp` contains BSD-licensed derived work. The
applicable BSD 3-Clause notice is preserved in the repository-root `LICENSE` file and must remain
with redistributed source or binaries as required by that license.
